summary: Database connection pool exhaustion during peak traffic
root_cause: Connection pool configured with size of 10, but peak traffic generates 50+ concurrent requests. Pool exhausted, new requests timeout after 30 seconds.
resolution: Increased connection pool size from 10 to 50. Added exponential backoff strategy for connection waits (100ms, 200ms, 400ms). Added monitoring to track pool utilization.
prevention: Set pool size to max_expected_concurrent_connections * 1.5 (75 in this case). Load test all deployments to verify pool sizing. Monitor pool utilization in production (alert at 80%).
